prompt: A science infographic of Hand Taiyin Lung Meridian meridians and acupoints, in a Xianxia-style semi-realistic anime illustration style with ink-wash aesthetic. Acupoint visualization: Yin meridians: blue-white cold light / Yang meridians: orange-gold warm light glowing acupoint dots, each strictly anchored to anatomical landmarks. Colored flowing lines connect all points following standard meridian paths. Acupoint labels follow the meridian sequence without crossing lines. Background: warm parchment texture, elegant ink-wash style. Title: vertical text in top corner on grey-blue background: "Hand Taiyin Lung Meridian". Quality: Xiaohongshu science infographic standard, prioritizing both character aesthetics and anatomical precision.
